title: T-015 — pick_lists + pick_list_lines + waves schema (11-shipping-d)
prompt:
# T-015 — Pick + Wave schema

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §9.1 (pick_lists, pick_list_lines), §6 D-SHP-6 Scanner-First UX, §6 D-SHP-2 FEFO, §11 V-SHIP-PICK-01..05
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Introduce `pick_lists`, `pick_list_lines`, and `waves` tables with RLS via `app.current_org_id()` + R13 audit + Drizzle schema. Add the pick_list_number sequence `PL-YYYY-NNNNN` (atomic, no gaps).

## Implementation contract
1. Migration creates:
   - ENUM `pick_list_status_enum` ('pending','assigned','in_progress','completed','cancelled').
   - ENUM `pick_type_enum` ('single_order','wave').
   - `waves` (org_id, wave_number text UNIQUE per org with format `WV-YYYY-NNNNN`, status text CHECK ('unreleased','released','in_pick','completed'), planned_start timestamptz, released_at, completed_at, R13).
   - `pick_lists` (org_id, pick_list_number text UNIQUE per org `PL-YYYY-NNNNN`, pick_type pick_type_enum, status pick_list_status_enum, priority int CHECK (1..5), assigned_to uuid, wave_id uuid nullable references waves, sales_order_id uuid nullable references sales_orders (for single_order), started_at, completed_at, org_site_id uuid, R13).
   - `pick_list_lines` (org_id, pick_list_id FK CASCADE, sales_order_line_id FK references sales_order_lines, license_plate_id uuid (suggested), location_id uuid, product_id uuid, lot_number text, quantity_to_pick numeric(14,3), quantity_picked numeric(14,3) DEFAULT 0, pick_sequence int — route order zone→aisle→bin, status text CHECK ('pending','picked','short'), picked_license_plate_id uuid (actual; may differ if override), picked_at, picked_by, R13).
2. RLS + FORCE RLS via app.current_org_id() on all 3 tables. Policies follow standard pattern.
3. Pick list number sequence: `pick_list_number_seq_v1` Postgres sequence atomic per org (use CTE + UPDATE on a counters table to scope per org_id, V-SHIP-PICK semantics; clone from 08-PROD WO numbering pattern).
4. RLS-aware policy on pick_lists: assigned scanner operator sees own + own team rows (consumer of 06-SCANNER T-003 role model). For shipping_manager / shipping_supervisor — full org scope.
5. Drizzle schema in `packages/db/src/schema/shipping/picks.ts`.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/00XX_shipping_picks.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/shipping/picks.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/shipping-picks-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a fresh DB, when migration runs, then 3 tables + 2 ENUMs exist, with org_id NOT NULL + R13 + RLS + FORCE RLS.
2. Given pg_policies inspected, when listed, then qual/withcheck reference app.current_org_id() with no GUC reads.
3. Given concurrent INSERT into pick_lists from two sessions in the same org, when each fetches next pick_list_number, then sequence advances atomically with no duplicates.
4. Given a scanner-operator session (no shipping_manager role) for org A, when SELECT FROM pick_lists runs, then only rows with assigned_to=current_user OR team membership match are visible (consumer of 06-SCANNER role model).
5. Given INSERT into pick_lists with priority=6, when CHECK runs, then it fails.

## Test strategy
- RED: testcontainers Postgres concurrency test asserting AC 1-5.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test shipping-picks-schema`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not use Postgres native nextval() for pick_list_number — sequence must scope per org (V-SHIP-SO-01 style).
- Do not name the business-scope column tenant_id.
- Do not read current_setting GUCs in policies.
- Do not omit FORCE RLS.
- Do not cascade DELETE from sales_orders to pick_lists — orphan check via release flow.
- Do not introduce a parallel pick_list_id sequence per pick_type (one global per org).

pipeline_inputs.description: pick_lists + pick_list_lines + waves tables + RLS via app.current_org_id() + atomic per-org pick_list_number sequence.
pipeline_inputs.details: Per-org sequence via counters table + UPDATE (clone 08-PROD WO numbering). Scanner-operator visibility scoped via 06-SCANNER role model.
cross_module_dependencies: 01-npd/T-001 (product FG SSOT — variance_tolerance_pct + allergen attributes; coverage hygiene per R3 audit 2026-05-14)
